sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("=== Key objects ===")
for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'O', 'M', 'G', 'p'] and n['pixels'] <= 25:
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = f"~({sum(rows)//len(rows)}, {sum(cols)//len(cols)})"
        else:
            center = "?"
        print(f"  {c} id={n['id']} px={n['pixels']} children={n['children']} {center}")

# Check adjacency for white diamond
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
node_map = {n['id']: n for n in nodes}
white_id = None
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 5:
        white_id = n['id']
        break

print(f"\nWhite diamond id={white_id}")
for a, b in adj:
    if a == white_id or b == white_id:
        other = b if a == white_id else a
        print(f"  Adjacent to: {other}({node_map[other]['color']}, {node_map[other]['pixels']}px)")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
